fields.implementation_summary: Updated ticket board immediate action text to include the recommended ticket state immediately after Start/start, wrap the title in quotes, and escape inner quotes so action strings remain unambiguous.
fields.title: Improve board immediate action wording
fields.validation_summary: Focused regression `cargo test -p ticket-cli board_show_immediate_actions_include_state_and_escaped_title -- --nocapture` passed from memory-viewers/memory-api, confirming both the action JSON string and the human board output include the state token and escaped quoted title.
